mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(REGIST_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS chart_date, COUNT(*) AS stockCount FROM STOCK_INFO WHERE REGIST_DATE >= SYSDATE - 7 AND REGIST_DATE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TO_CHAR(REGIST_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY TO_CHAR(REGIST_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
SELECT TOWN_NAME FROM BOARD_TOWN WHERE TOWN_NO LIKE #{sido} || '___'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.STOCK_NO AS stockNo, c.LAT AS lat, c.LNG AS lng, i.STOCK_NAME, i.STOCK_TYPE, i.STOCK_SELL_PRICE, i.STOCK_MANAGE_FEE, i.STOCK_FEE_MONTH, i.EXCLUSIVE_AREA, i.SUPPLY_AREA, i.CURRENT_FLOOR, i.FLOOR_TOTAL_COUNT, i.STOCK_FORM, i.REGIST_DATE, b.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, b.COMPANY_NAME, b.COMPANY_LOCATION, b.PRESIDENT_NAME, b.BROKER_NO, b.PRESIDENT_PHONE, img.IMG_URL AS imgUrl FROM STOCK_COORD c INNER JOIN STOCK_INFO i ON c.STOCK_NO = i.STOCK_NO INNER JOIN BROKER_INFO b ON i.MEMBER_NO = b.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN STOCK_IMG img ON img.STOCK_NO = i.STOCK_NO AND img.IMG_ORDER = 0 ORDER BY i.STOCK_NO DESC ) ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT i.STOCK_NO, i.MEMBER_NO, i.STOCK_NAME, i.STOCK_SELL_PRICE, i.STOCK_FEE_MONTH, i.STOCK_INFO, i.STOCK_TYPE, i.STOCK_FORM, i.EXCLUSIVE_AREA, i.SUPPLY_AREA, i.CURRENT_FLOOR, i.FLOOR_TOTAL_COUNT, i.ROOM_COUNT, i.BATH_COUNT, i.STOCK_DIRECTION, i.ABLE_DATE, i.USE_APPROVAL_DATE, i.REGIST_DATE, i.STOCK_DETAIL, i.STOCK_ADDRESS, i.REGION_NO, i.SELL_YN, b.COMPANY_NAME, b.COMPANY_LOCATION, b.PRESIDENT_NAME, b.BROKER_NO, b.PRESIDENT_PHONE, c.LAT, c.LNG, s.IMG_URL FROM STOCK_INFO i JOIN STOCK_COORD c ON c.STOCK_NO = i.STOCK_NO JOIN STOCK_IMG s ON s.STOCK_NO = i.STOCK_NO JOIN BROKER_INFO b ON b.MEMBER_NO = i.MEMBER_NO WHERE i.STOCK_NO = #{stockNo}
